evidence_summary: Minerva Neurosciences Securities Corporation is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Minerva Neurosciences, Inc. This relationship is explicitly documented in the company's SEC filings, including Exhibit 21.1 (List of Subsidiaries) and consolidated financial statements in Form 10-Q and 10-K filings, which state that the consolidated financial statements include the results of the company and its wholly-owned subsidiaries, including Minerva Neurosciences Securities Corporation.
